    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Qué es Itz'ana Resort & Residences? / What is Itz'ana Resort?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana Resort & Residences is a luxury resort in Placencia, Belize (Mile 20 Placencia Road, Stann Creek District), bordered by the Caribbean Sea and tropical jungle. It offers beachfront villas, suites, penthouses, a spa, pristine white-sand beach, outdoor pool, organic garden, yoga terrace, and a full-service marina. Just minutes from the world's second-largest barrier reef — perfect for diving, snorkeling, fishing, and sailing. Website: www.itzanabelize.com"
  },
  {

    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Qué tipos de alojamiento tienen? / What accommodation options do you have?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana offers several accommodation types:\n• Beachfront Villas (1, 2, and 3 bedrooms) — private terrace, plunge pool, steps from the beach\n• Penthouses (2 and 3 bedrooms) — top-floor luxury with private plunge pool and sea views\n• Beachfront Suite — king bed, living/dining area, private wrap-around terrace\n• Deluxe Room — poolside retreat with private terrace and sofa bed\n\nPrices vary by date and season. Book here: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations"
  },

    "respuesta": "Our 1-bedroom beachfront villa is a secluded retreat with breathtaking Caribbean Sea views. It features a private terrace with plunge pool, a fully equipped kitchen, luxurious linens, and is just steps from the beach. Perfect for couples seeking a private paradise.\n\nBook: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations"

It features a modern design, 2 bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, open-concept living room and kitchen, and a sea-view terrace with plunge pool plus an interior courtyard pool. Ideal for families or small groups.\n\nBook: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations"

    "pregunta": "¿Cómo es la villa de 3 dormitorios? / Tell me about the 3-bedroom villa",
    "respuesta": "Our 3-bedroom villa opens directly onto Placencia Beach. With 1,470 sqm of living space designed in harmony with nature, it features a master bedroom with sea views, 2 plunge pools, an interior courtyard, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Services available include private chef, butler, spa in-villa, babysitter, and a stocked villa bar.\n\nBook: https://reservations.itzanabelize.com/book/accommodations"

    "pregunta": "¿Qué servicios adicionales hay para las villas? / What extra services are available for villas?",
    "respuesta": "All villas can request these exclusive services:\n• Private Chef — personalized Belizean cuisine with fresh, seasonal ingredients\n• Butler Service — impeccable, professional attention for your entire stay\n• In-Villa Spa — massages and body treatments with the sound of the sea\n• Babysitter — so you can relax or explore while your children are cared for\n• Villa Bar — stocked with premium spirits (vodka, gin, rum, tequila), beer, sodas, and water\n\nContact reservations@itzanabelize.com to arrange."
  },

  {

    "propiedad": "ITZ",
    "categoria": "restaurantes",
    "tags": [
      "limilia",

    "pregunta": "¿Qué es Limilia Restaurant? / Tell me about Limilia Restaurant",
    "respuesta": "Limilia Restaurant celebrates fresh Caribbean flavors with a nod to the Garifuna people of Belize. Seasonal, seafood-based cuisine highlights locally sourced ingredients — vegetables and herbs from our organic farm, fresh catch by our own fishermen. Dine with a relaxing view of the pool and beach.\n\n• Breakfast menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/breakfast-menu-compressed.pdf\n• Lunch menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/lunch-menu.pdf\n• Dinner menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/limilia-dinner.pdf\n• Wine & cocktail menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/limilia-wine.pdf\n\nReservations: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329"
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Qué es Nadu? / What is Nadu restaurant?",
    "respuesta": "Nadu (meaning 'tree' in Garifuna) is our exclusive pop-up dining experience under the trees, beachside. Sustainable cuisine with fresh, organic, seasonal ingredients — a farm-to-table concept. The menu changes daily based on local produce.\n\nAvailable for groups of 15 or more. Advance reservation required.\nContact: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329"
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Qué bares y lounges tienen? / What bars and lounges do you have?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana has several bars and lounges:\n• Biblio Bar — craft cocktails, wine, beer, and snacks. Open seasonally 5:00 PM–10:00 PM (or during special events like Rum Tasting).\n• Luna Bar — craft cocktails, wine, beer in a casual atmosphere. Menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/luna-bar.pdf\n• Pool Bar — refreshing cocktails, tropical drinks, cold beers, wine. Menu: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/ResourceFiles/restaurant-pdf-menus/lunch-menu.pdf\n• Rum Room — Caribbean and Central American rums curated by our sommelier in the Great House\n• Private Owner's Lounge — exclusive for residents and their guests"
  },

    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Qué actividades y excursiones ofrecen? / What activities and excursions do you offer?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana is the perfect base for Belizean adventures:\n• Snorkeling and diving at the world's second-largest barrier reef\n• Deep-sea and fly fishing\n• Wildlife sanctuary night walks (jaguar spotting)\n• Zip-lining through the jungle canopy\n• Ancient Maya site explorations\n• Sunset cruise on the Placencia Lagoon\n• Cacao farm tours\n• Sailing on pristine Caribbean waters\n\nSee all beach adventures: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/aventuras?adv=aventuras-y-excursiones-en-la-playa\nPackages & promotions: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/especiales-paquetes?sp=Promociones"
  },
  {

    "pregunta": "¿Tienen marina? / Do you have a marina?",
    "respuesta": "Yes! Itz'ana has a full-service marina with 18 boat slips, a water sports activity center, fuel station, and supply store. It's the perfect base for fishing trips, diving, snorkeling, and sailing excursions.\n\nContact concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329 for marina and activity bookings."
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Qué servicios de spa y bienestar tienen? / What spa and wellness services do you offer?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana Spa offers massages and body treatments by professional therapists — inside the spa or in your villa with the sound of the sea. We also have a yoga terrace with panoramic ocean and peninsula views.\n\nTo book spa treatments, contact: concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329"
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Tienen paquetes o promociones especiales? / Do you have special packages or promotions?",
    "respuesta": "Yes! Itz'ana offers curated packages designed to inspire relaxation, romance, and adventure — from couples' escapes to family adventures.\n\nSee all current packages and promotions: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/especiales-paquetes?sp=Promociones\n\nFor personalized quotes, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com"
  },

    "id": "itz_bodas_eventos_overview",
    "propiedad": "ITZ",
    "categoria": "bodas_eventos",
    "tags": [
      "boda",

    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Hacen bodas y eventos especiales? / Do you host weddings and special events?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana Resort & Residences is an exclusive, sophisticated setting for weddings and special events. We offer multiple stunning venues, personalized services, and even Mayan shaman ceremonies.\n\nVenues available:\n• Limilia Deck — outdoor, garden & sea views, up to 122 guests\n• The Great House — elegant indoor space, up to 150 guests\n• Yoga Deck — elevated, panoramic ocean views, up to 70 guests (intimate ceremonies)\n• Private Beach — Caribbean backdrop, up to 150 guests\n\nTo start planning: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/bodas-eventos/empiece-a-planificar\nEvents calendar: https://www.itzanabelize.com/events\nFor quotes, contact: reservations@itzanabelize.com or +813-567-1059"
  },
  {
    "id": "itz_bodas_espacios",
    "propiedad": "ITZ",
    "categoria": "bodas_eventos",
    "tags": [
      "espacios",
      "venues",
      "limilia deck",
      "great house",
      "yoga deck",
      "playa privada",
      "private beach",
      "capacidad",
      "capacity",
      "invitados",
      "guests",
      "ceremonia"
    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Cuáles son los espacios para eventos y cuántas personas caben?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana event venues:\n• Limilia Deck — outdoor, garden/sea views, max 122 guests. Great for open-air dinners and receptions.\n• The Great House — elegant indoor space, max 150 guests. Ideal for formal events and large receptions.\n• Yoga Deck — elevated, panoramic ocean + peninsula views, max 70 guests. Perfect for intimate ceremonies.\n• Private Beach — Caribbean Sea backdrop, max 150 guests. Unique open-air celebration on the sand.\n\nMost common spaces: Playa and Limilia area, capacity up to 160–200 guests combined.\n\nNote: The resort does not provide its own furniture/equipment — chairs, linens, sound systems must be rented from external suppliers (the resort can recommend trusted vendors)."
  },
  {
    "id": "itz_bodas_catering",
    "propiedad": "ITZ",

    ],
    "pregunta": "¿Qué opciones de catering tienen para eventos? / What catering options do you have for events?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana offers 4 buffet options for events (30–100 guests), priced per person (taxes and service charges not included):\n\n• Mediterranean Buffet — fresh salads, ceviches, soups, Mediterranean-inspired mains\n• Classic American Buffet — salads, sushi, soups, quality American-style cuts\n• Meet & Grill Buffet — grilled meats and seafood, bold flavors, asado style\n• Caribbean Vibes Buffet — local Caribbean flavors, tropical fruits, fresh seafood\n\nFor pricing and availability, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com"
  },
  {
    "id": "itz_bodas_open_bar",
    "propiedad": "ITZ",
    "categoria": "bodas_eventos",

      "per hour"

    "pregunta": "¿Tienen servicio de barra abierta para eventos? / Do you offer open bar service for events?",
    "respuesta": "Yes! Three open bar tiers available (priced per person per hour):\n\n• Relax Open Bar — Stolichnaya, Absolut, Beefeater Gin. Starting from USD $32/person/hour.\n• Deluxe Open Bar — Ketel One, Titos Vodka, Bombay. Premium pricing per hours contracted.\n• Premium Open Bar — Belvedere, Grey Goose, Zacapa 23. Luxury pricing.\n\nExtra hourly charges apply. Corkage fee available if you bring your own wine/champagne.\n\nFor a detailed quote, contact reservations@itzanabelize.com"
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Con quién contacto para organizar un evento o boda? / Who do I contact to plan a wedding or event?",
    "respuesta": "To get a quote or start planning your event or wedding, contact our events team:\n\n📧 reservations@itzanabelize.com\n📞 +813-567-1059\n📱 WhatsApp: +(501) 615-0674\n\nStart planning online: https://www.itzanabelize.com/es/bodas-eventos/empiece-a-planificar\n\nWe also offer unique Mayan shaman ceremonies, customizable to your beliefs and preferences."

    "pregunta": "¿Dónde están ubicados? / Where is Itz'ana located?",
    "respuesta": "Itz'ana Resort & Residences is located on the Placencia Peninsula, Stann Creek District, southeast Belize.\n\nAddress: Mile 20 Placencia Road, Placencia, Stann Creek District, Belize\n\nThe resort is 20 minutes from Placencia Village and 3.5 hours by car from Belize City and Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport."
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Cómo llegar a Itz'ana? / How do I get to Itz'ana?",
    "respuesta": "You can reach Itz'ana by land, air, or sea:\n\n• By Land: 3.5 hours drive from Belize City and Philip S.W. Goldson International Airport.\n• By Air: Domestic flight to Placencia Airstrip (short drive to the resort). Several airlines offer connections from Belize City.\n• By Sea: Scenic arrival by boat.\n\nComplimentary bikes are available for exploring the Placencia Peninsula once you arrive."
  },

    "pregunta": "¿Tienen shuttles, golf carts o taxis? / Do you have shuttles, golf carts, or taxis?",
    "respuesta": "• Shuttles — available to Maya Beach and Placencia Village. Cost: USD $10 per additional person + taxes, subject to availability.\n• Golf carts — available for rent (not complimentary). Pricing provided by our team.\n• Taxis — our concierge can arrange.\n• Complimentary bikes — free to use for exploring the peninsula.\n• Airport: approximately 8 minutes away. First flight departs around 7:00 AM with Maya Island Air.\n\nContact concierge@itzanabelize.com or +(501) 610-1329 to arrange transportation."
  },
